settings.text: Choose residential panel door or commercial roll-up door based on your door style.
Measure each door before ordering, especially for larger or multiple doors.
Ask for help if the opening is oversized, unusual, or part of a larger metal building project.

settings.heading: Panel Doors
settings.text: For common sectional garage door panels.

settings.heading: Roll-Up Doors
settings.text: For commercial roll-up door applications.

settings.heading: Measure First
settings.text: Width and height drive kit choice.

settings.heading: Help Available
settings.text: Useful for multiple-door projects.

settings.heading: Metal building doors
settings.text: A good fit for residential panel doors or commercial roll-up doors when the kit matches the opening.

settings.heading: Unmeasured doors
settings.text: Do not guess on kit size. Measure width and height before choosing.

settings.heading: Tape or custom help
settings.text: Multiple doors, oversized doors, or unusual doors may need extra material or a quote.

settings.heading: Is This Right For Me?
settings.text: Use the door kit path when the door style and measured size match the product.

settings.heading: Single door
settings.text: Measure the full insulated area and match the kit to the opening.

settings.heading: Double door
settings.text: Confirm width and height before choosing the closest kit.

settings.heading: Ask first
settings.text: Oversized or unusual doors are easier to size with photos and dimensions.

settings.heading: Plan together
settings.text: For several doors, request help so material and tape are estimated together.

settings.heading: Which Door Kit Fits?
settings.text: Measure before ordering and choose based on door style, width, and height.

settings.heading: Double-Sided Tape
settings.text: Useful for temporary hold and door kit layout where the install calls for it.

settings.heading: 3" White Vapor Barrier Seam Tape
settings.text: Helps with clean seams or repairs where the door layout needs it.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Pro 2mm 50" Wide
settings.text: Useful for custom doors or larger multi-door projects.

settings.heading: Request Quote / Help
settings.text: Best path for oversized, unusual, or multiple-door projects.

settings.heading: What Usually Goes With This
settings.text: Door projects often need measuring help, tape, or extra material depending on the door layout.

settings.heading: Measuring notes
settings.text: Measure the full door width and height. For multiple doors, measure each door separately.

settings.heading: Install overview
settings.text: Dry fit the material, trim with a sharp utility knife, then attach according to the kit style.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.text: Residential panel doors and commercial roll-up doors use different install paths. Ask for help if you are unsure.

settings.heading: Details
settings.text: Door sizing, install notes, and common questions are tucked below.
